A key location on Route 3, between Trelew and Comodoro Rivadavia. Every time I've been there, the restrooms have been clean.

reviews.comment:
De todas las estaciones YPF recorridas en este viaje por la 40 y la 3 me pareció la mas baja comparándolas con las de la misma empresa

La atención bastante seca, las duchas únicamente para camioneros, la limpieza medio pelo.

Los salva que es la única entre trelew y cómodoro.

Pero mucho por mejorar a lo que pretenden ser las nuevas estaciones de servicios

(Translated by Google)
Of all the YPF stations I visited on this trip along Route 40 and Route 3, this one seemed the worst compared to others belonging to the same company.

The service was quite curt, the showers were only for truckers, and the cleanliness was mediocre.

Its saving grace is that it's the only one between Trelew and Comodoro.

But there's a lot of room for improvement in what these new service stations are supposed to be.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUREdUlXa1NBEAE

reviews.comment:
Garayalde es el oasis que encontras despues de recorrer 200km de nada.
El personal siempre buena onda.
Los precios son dignos de un oasis.
Quizas deban refaccionar los baños que estan medios dejados pero estan limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Garayalde is the oasis you find after traveling 200km for nothing.
The staff are always friendly.
The prices are worthy of an oasis.
Perhaps they should renovate the bathrooms, which are a bit run down, but they are clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNEejdmTGFnEAE
